Variables.Name: Resilience
Variables.Description:
Dampens the velocity of a particle in the direction normal to the
	  collision plane.

Variables.Name: ResilienceScaleOverLife
Variables.Description: Modulates the resilience of the particle over its lifetime.

Variables.Name: Friction
Variables.Description:
Friction applied to all particles during a collision or while moving
	  along a surface.

Variables.Name: RandomSpread
Variables.Description: Controls how wide the bouncing particles are distributed (0 = disabled).

Variables.Name: RandomDistribution
Variables.Description: Controls bouncing particles distribution (1 = uniform distribution; 2 = squared distribution).

Variables.Name: RadiusScale
Variables.Description: Scale applied to the size of the particle to obtain the collision radius.

Variables.Name: RadiusBias
Variables.Description: Bias applied to the collision radius.

Variables.Name: Response
Variables.Description: How particles respond to a collision event.
